about:
Hello! I'm Thiago Quaglia. Since I was young, I've always been very curious about technology, which naturally led me into the world of programming when I started my studies.

I am a University Systems Analyst and currently work as a backend developer, participating in the design and development of solutions that connect different systems and help automate business processes. I also have the opportunity to support development teams in technical decisions and best practices.

I particularly enjoy working in the backend area, where I specialize the most, although I’m also comfortable working on frontend tasks when a project requires it. In addition, I’m very interested in the world of DevOps and infrastructure, always eager to keep learning and better understand how systems work end to end.

I consider myself a curious, committed person with a strong focus on continuous learning. I enjoy getting involved in projects, proposing improvements, and continuing to grow alongside the teams I work with.

tasks: I design and develop backend solutions that connect different systems and automate business processes.
I am involved from requirements analysis to technical implementation, always aiming for efficient and scalable solutions.
I also lead backend development teams, supporting technical decisions and promoting good engineering practices.
I worked on improving and standardizing development and deployment environments using containers.
I performed database administration tasks, including migrations and backups.
I collaborated on configuring and maintaining infrastructure in orchestrated environments and cloud services.
I worked with the technical team to improve deployment processes and service operations.
Completion of personal projects to expand my knowledge and improve my skills.
